summary: Phase 4.7: Garment Serial Tracking Demo - Complete E2E Testing. All backend APIs and frontend UI features tested and working perfectly. Stateless demo with hardcoded data, no DB required, public access (no auth).
passed_tests: Backend: Filter by status=ongoing returns 5 serials
Backend: Filter by status=completed returns 4 serials
Backend: Filter by status=pending returns 3 serials
Backend: Search by serial number SN-2026-0001 works correctly
Frontend: Summary cards display correct counts (5 ongoing, 4 completed, 3 pending)
Frontend: Daftar Serial tab shows all 12 serials
Frontend: Click serial row expands and shows mini trace/timeline
Frontend: Trace Timeline tab with search input works
Frontend: Search for SN-2026-0003 displays 6 timeline events with full details
Frontend: Click 'Mulai Demo Gratis' navigates DIRECTLY to /demo/garment-serial (no gate form, correct for stateless demo)
